_meta.label: BEFORE — instant-distance full-rebuild backend (Phase 26 T7 baseline)
_meta.machine: captured on the T7 dev machine; relative win is the point, not absolute us
_meta.note: cold_recall_after_single_store pays a full O(n) HNSW rebuild on every store-then-recall iteration. A 20k run did not finish in a reasonable time, which is why the baseline is captured at n=2000.
